who: procurement managers in small to medium-sized e-commerce businesses processing 10–50 invoices/month
offer: For procurement managers in small to medium-sized e-commerce businesses processing 10–50 invoices/month, manual reconciliation causes payment delays. We streamline the reconciliation process instead of using spreadsheets.
problem: Difficulty in reconciling vendor invoices with purchase orders leads to discrepancies and potential payment delays.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for procurement managers seeking solutions
Engage in Indie Hackers discussions about similar workflows
Direct message 20-50 procurement managers with a demo video
Participate in community forums sharing procurement tools
try_it: Let users try Email notifications for discrepancies and Weekly summary reports on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: 1-page landing page with the one-liner and CTA
Short demo video showing the manual-first workflow
Collect 10 short interviews from target users
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Post a weekly progress update in a relevant community
automation_simplification_ideas: One-click export of a simple report
